headline: Occidental Petroleum Jumps 4% While ExxonMobil, Chevron Lag: Evercore Upgrade and Oil Spike Fuel OXY’s Lead
summary: Shares of Occidental Petroleum (NYSE:OXY) are up 4% at midday Wednesday, trading at $53.90. The move puts Occidental well ahead of integrated peers ExxonMobil (NYSE:XOM) and Chevron (NYSE:CVX). ExxonMobil stock is off 1% at $140.51, essentially flat. Meanwhile, Chevron shares are higher by 1% to $176.07, a modest gain that trails Occidental by a wide ... headline: Chevron (CVX) Following Index Removal And Guyana Upgrades, Is The Valuation Case Intact?
summary: Chevron (CVX) was recently removed from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index, a move that raises fresh questions about how index changes intersect with the company’s evolving projects, cash flow plans, and dividend profile. See our latest analysis for Chevron. Despite the index removal, Chevron’s share price has been resilient, with a 1-day share price return of 3.52% and 7-day share price return of 4.98% following upgrades tied to its Guyana projects. Its 1-year total shareholder return of 18.31%...

headline: Chevron and ZL Chemicals Announce Technology Licensing Agreement for Advanced Chemical Surfactant Technology
summary: HOUSTON, July 08, 2026--Chevron Technical Center, a division of Chevron U.S.A. Inc., a subsidiary of Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX), and ZL Chemicals Ltd today announced a technology licensing agreement under which ZL may commercialize Chevron-developed chemical surfactant technology. ZL plans to offer products and services utilizing the licensed technology under the Vantis™ brand.

raw.headline: Chevron and ZL Chemicals Announce Technology Licensing Agreement for Advanced Chemical Surfactant Technology
raw.summary: HOUSTON, July 08, 2026--Chevron Technical Center, a division of Chevron U.S.A. Inc., a subsidiary of Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX), and ZL Chemicals Ltd today announced a technology licensing agreement under which ZL may commercialize Chevron-developed chemical surfactant technology. ZL plans to offer products and services utilizing the licensed technology under the Vantis™ brand.
